name: Possible Malicious URL File Remote Code Execution
description: Adversaries may exploit Web Distributed Authoring and Versioning (WEBDAV) with URL vulnerability to execute remote code on a victim's system. This tactic can be used for gaining remote access and control.

filterSets.name: Web Distributed Authoring and Versioning Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
Suspicious File Access of Executable Binary in UNC Path

author: Letian Cheng
